reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
TENGAN CUIDADO QUE TE CARGAN NAFTA REBAJADA, CARGUE NAFTA INFINIA Y ME QUEDE CON EL AUTO. TUVE QUE VACIAR AL TANQUE Y SISTEMA DE INYECCION.

(Translated by Google)
BE CAREFUL, THEY'RE SELLING YOU WITH REDUCED GAS. I FILLED UP WITH INFINIA GAS AND MY CAR WAS LEFT OUT. I HAD TO DRAIN THE TANK AND FUEL INJECTION SYSTEM.
